notes: Section 218, , as added , , stated necessity to curb unfair, deceptive, and fraudulent practices relating to live poultry.act Aug. 15, 1921, ch. 64, title V, § 501Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 53249 Stat. 648

Section 218b, , as added , , defined “live poultry dealer”.act Aug. 15, 1921, ch. 64, title V, § 503Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 53249 Stat. 649

Section 218d, , as added , , related to suspension and revocation of licenses.act Aug. 15, 1921, ch. 64, title V, § 505Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 53249 Stat. 649
